{{Quote|No Hutts, no Jawas. This is already better than Tatooine.|[[Mara Jade Skywalker|Mara Jade]]|<ref name="Star Wars: Mara Jade – By the Emperor's Hand">''[[Star Wars: Mara Jade – By the Emperor's Hand]]''</ref>}}
'''Svivren''' was a mountainous [[Outer Rim Territories/Legends|Outer Rim Territories]] [[Planet/Legends|planet]] not far from [[Andasala]].<ref name="GATORW">''[[Geonosis and the Outer Rim Worlds]]''</ref> It was at the terminus of the [[Five Veils Route]], which connected it to [[Suarbi 7|Suarbi]].<ref name="TEA" /> Despite the harsh climate of the world and its severe seasonal variation, the native [[Svivreni]] thrived and made it an important regional trading port. Its population of more than eight billion included large colonies of [[Human/Legends|Humans]], [[Sullustan/Legends|Sullustans]] and [[Ewok/Legends|Ewoks]].<ref name="TTS" /> The source of Svivren's Ewok population was unknown. The importance of trade was reflected in the planet's [[Festival of Great Trade]].

Svivreni law forbid the presence of personal weapons, and any violent acts resulted in an immediate public execution. Well-armed security forces enforced these harsh codes effectively. The planet had a low crime rate and was avoided by smugglers.<ref name="TTS" /><ref name="GATORW" />

[[File:Svivren.jpg|thumb|left|A slum in Wrils.]]
The planet was divided into a northern and a southern district. The northern district was experiencing an anti-Imperial rebellion as of [[4 ABY/Legends|4 ABY]]. The southern district as a result had fewer troops and of less quality. The southern garrison was commanded by [[High General]] [[Touno]], who resided in the southern district's capital of [[Wrils]].

The planet was directly represented in the [[Galactic Senate/Legends|Galactic Senate]].

Svivren remained completely neutral during the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]] and resisted any [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] attempts to occupy the planet.<ref name="TTS" /> During the [[Thrawn campaign]], Imperial forces [[Siege of Svivren|attacked]] Svivren but were repelled.<ref name="GATORW" />

The planet was home to the [[Svivren Xenomineralogy Institute]], which graduated fine mining foremen and metallurgists.
